name: shopops-mcp
description: AI e-commerce operations for Shopify + WooCommerce. Moving-average demand forecasting, margin-based pricing, RFM 7-segment customer analysis, fraud/anomaly detection, ABC product performance, automated daily/weekly reports. 12 tools, 4 resources, 3 prompts.

store_connect.description: Connect a Shopify (Admin API token + store domain) or WooCommerce (consumer key/secret + base URL) store. Validates credentials with a ping request. Returns the connection id used by all other tools.

store_sync.description: Refresh inventory, orders, customers, and products from the connected store. Respects platform rate limits (Shopify 2req/s, WooCommerce unlimited). Returns per-entity counts and last_synced_at.

inventory_status.description: Current stock levels per SKU with low-stock alerts (< reorder point), back-order flags, and days-until-stockout based on current sell-through rate.

inventory_forecast.description: Moving-average demand projection (configurable window 7/14/30 days) with safety-stock buffer. Returns projected demand, reorder point, and suggested PO quantity per SKU.

pricing_analyze.description: Price elasticity report per SKU: current margin, sales velocity, competitor benchmark if URL provided, and under/over-priced flag based on demand curve.

pricing_optimize.description: Suggest optimal price per SKU combining margin analysis, sales velocity, and configurable rules (minimum margin %, ceiling, rounding). Returns current price, suggested price, expected demand change.

customers_segment.description: RFM analysis (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) assigning customers to 7 segments: Champions, Loyal, Potential Loyalist, At Risk, Can't Lose Them, Hibernating, New Customers. Returns segment counts and per-segment LTV averages.

customers_churn.description: Churn risk score (0-100) per customer based on days since last order, frequency decay, and RFM drift. Returns top-N at-risk customers with retention action recommendations.

order_anomalies.description: Pattern-based fraud and anomaly detection: unusually large orders, repeat billing address with varied shipping, rapid-fire orders, high-risk country flags. Severity-ranked list with explanation per flag.

product_performance.description: ABC/Pareto analysis classifying products as A (top 80% of revenue), B (next 15%), C (long tail). Per-class metrics and recommendations (promote A, reassess C).

report_daily.description: Daily operations summary: revenue, orders, low-stock alerts, top customers, top products, flagged orders. JSON or CSV output.

report_weekly.description: Weekly trend report with period-over-period deltas, top gainers/decliners, inventory risk outlook, and customer-segment movement.
